tool_args.label: Third Avenue Offset Bus Lane (36th-56th)
tool_args.raw_text: Fall 2014: curbside bus lane converted to "offset" bus lane from 36th Street to 56th Street

payload.description: Curbside bus lane converted to offset bus lane from 36th Street to 56th Street on Third Avenue. Improves bus speeds and reliability for M101, M102, M103, and express buses. Adds daytime commercial loading space to curb.

tool_args.label: Third Avenue and 57th Street Bus Boarding Island & Pedestrian Safety Improvements
tool_args.raw_text: Add boarding island two lanes from curb from 56th Street to 57th Street. Ban left-turn from 57th St EB onto Third Avenue. Add green signal time. Add protected crossing time. Add leading bus interval (LBI).

payload.project_name: Third Avenue and 57th Street Bus Boarding Island & Pedestrian Safety Improvements
payload.project_type: bus boarding island and pedestrian safety
payload.description: Proposed improvements at Third Avenue and 57th Street including bus boarding island for M101/M102/M103 stops, pedestrian refuges at two crosswalks, banning left turn from 57th St EB onto Third Ave, adding protected crossing time (LPI), and adding Leading Bus Interval at 55th Street.

tool_args.label: Offset bus lane Third Avenue 36th-56th
tool_args.raw_text: Fall 2014: curbside bus lane converted to "offset" bus lane from 36th Street to 56th Street

payload.description: Curbside bus lane converted to offset bus lane from 36th Street to 56th Street on Third Avenue
payload.location_text: Third Avenue from 36th Street to 56th Street, Manhattan

normalized_location.raw_text: Third Avenue from 36th Street to 56th Street, Manhattan

tool_args.label: Bus boarding island Third Avenue at 57th Street
tool_args.raw_text: Add boarding island two lanes from curb from 56th Street to 57th Street

payload.description: Bus boarding island two lanes from curb from 56th Street to 57th Street on Third Avenue, allowing M101, M102, M103 to stop at 57th Street and providing pedestrian refuge at two crosswalks
payload.location_text: Third Avenue from 56th Street to 57th Street, Manhattan

normalized_location.raw_text: Third Avenue from 56th Street to 57th Street, Manhattan

tool_args.label: Ban left-turn from 57th St EB onto Third Ave
tool_args.raw_text: Ban left-turn from 57th St EB onto Third Avenue

payload.description: Ban left-turn from 57th Street eastbound onto Third Avenue to reduce pedestrian conflict in north crosswalk and provide more green time for Third Ave traffic and pedestrians and 57th Street WB traffic

tool_args.label: Leading Pedestrian Interval at 57th Street east crosswalk
tool_args.raw_text: Add protected crossing time on east crosswalk. "Leading Pedestrian Interval" (LPI). Gives pedestrians time to cross before heavy right-turn phase begins.

payload.description: Add protected crossing time (Leading Pedestrian Interval) on east crosswalk of 57th Street, giving pedestrians time to cross before heavy right-turn phase begins
payload.location_text: East crosswalk of 57th Street at Third Avenue, Manhattan

normalized_location.raw_text: East crosswalk of 57th Street at Third Avenue, Manhattan

tool_args.label: Leading Bus Interval at 55th Street
tool_args.raw_text: Add "Leading Bus Interval" (LBI) at 55th Street. Assists bus in safely getting to left side of island.

payload.description: Add Leading Bus Interval (LBI) at 55th Street to assist bus in safely getting to left side of island

tool_args.label: Add green signal time Third Ave NB and 57th St WB
tool_args.raw_text: Add green signal time to Third Avenue NB and 57th Street WB traffic

tool_args.label: Third Ave & 57th St is a Vision Zero Priority Intersection
tool_args.raw_text: Third Avenue & 57th Street is a high-crash intersection for pedestrians. Vision Zero "Priority Intersection". Heavy turn volumes and high pedestrian volumes.

payload.claim_text: Third Avenue & 57th Street is a high-crash intersection for pedestrians. Vision Zero 'Priority Intersection'.
payload.description: Intersection classified as Vision Zero Priority Intersection due to high crash history, heavy turn volumes, and high pedestrian volumes.

tool_args.label: No bus stops between 55th and 61st on Third Ave
tool_args.raw_text: No bus stops between 55th Street and 61st Street. Bus cannot access curb 57th St to 59th St due to right-turn lanes to Queensboro Bridge. 57th Street is a major destination.

payload.claim_text: No bus stops between 55th Street and 61st Street. Bus cannot access curb 57th St to 59th St due to right-turn lanes to Queensboro Bridge.
payload.description: Transit gap on Third Avenue between 55th and 61st Streets with existing M101, M102, M103 bus stops only above/below this segment
